steps.speaker: The Ferryman
steps.line: Keep your hands inside the rail. The Grey does not give back what it takes.

steps.speaker: The Ferryman
steps.line: This water runs between the years. You will feel the cold change under you.

steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: Behind you the war is still being fought. Ahead it has already been counted and filed.

steps.speaker: The Ferryman
steps.line: Welcome to the Coast, traveller, where every debt found its ledger.

steps.speaker: The Ferryman
steps.line: Back across, then. Few of the counted ever ask to return.

steps.speaker: The Ferryman
steps.line: The fog will lift on an older world. Torches, not tallies.

steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: The ledger closes behind you. The war opens again ahead.

steps.speaker: The Ferryman
steps.line: Mind the step. Draconia has not finished bleeding.
